title: indigofera alternans
intro: Indigofera alternans is a perennial plant species commonly known as the alternate leaf indigo or bitter leaf indigo, which belongs to the Fabaceae family of plants. It is traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Indigofera alternans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or powder to make herbal remedies, such as tonics and capsules.
